---
mode: ask
description: Migrate a Replit full-stack app to Cloudflare Workers + D1 incrementally
---

Migrate this repository from Replit hosting/runtime to Cloudflare Workers + D1.

Rules:
- GitHub is the source of truth
- keep the frontend UI mostly unchanged
- migrate incrementally
- prefer small commits
- explain files before coding
- summarize exact changes after coding
- keep secrets out of the repo
- use Wrangler config and D1 migrations
- do not refactor unrelated code
